response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, but the role requires a CTO-level executive with 5+ years of senior technical leadership, proven scaling of engineering orgs from 10 to 30+, and demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech. The resume shows no people-management or executive leadership history, only nascent AI-agent infrastructure exposure at re:cinq (started April 2025), and limited fintech depth (a single ~15-month stint at RIDE Capital as an IC). Core hard requirements for the CTO role are not met.
strengths: Deep, polyglot engineering background across distributed systems, microservices, and high-throughput services (Sociomantic millions of req/sec)
Some recent exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source founder of GISCollective
concerns: No demonstrated executive/CTO leadership or experience scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers
Lacks production multi-agent AI systems experience in regulated, high-stakes commercial environments
Thin fintech-infrastructure depth (credit, liquidity, compliance) — only one IC fintech role

key_factors.factor: No executive leadership / team scaling track record
